'''Lillea Bringbit''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], [[Coruscanti/Legends|hailed]] [[Homeworld/Legends|from]]<ref name="DB" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="aotcvis">''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="DB" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="Episode II" /> she frequented the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of her homeworld.<ref name="DB" />

In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="NEC" /> shortly before the war, Bringbit visited the district the [[Local day/Legends|night]] of the [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|attempted assassination]] of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]. The [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] crashed her [[Koro-2 all-environment exodrive airspeeder|speeder]] there, throwing her pursuer, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], off the speeder.<ref name="Episode II" /> A surprised<ref name="HB">{{HBCite|64}}</ref> Bringbit and others surrounded Skywalker and watched on as he got up and ran off towards Wesell.<ref name="Episode II" />

Bringbit possessed light skin and [[Color/Legends|blonde]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="DB" /> When she visited the district, Bringbit wore a dark colored [[Clothing/Legends|top]], dark colored [[Glove/Legends|gloves]], and two armbands on her left [[Limb/Legends|arm]].<ref name="Episode II">{{Film|II}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I was mortified, because there I was on the big screen — at least Julie was there too. John took his laser pointer, circled our faces and said, 'there's Gillian and there's Julie.' But George finaled the shot so I guess my acting debut was a success!|Gillian Libbert on her appearance in ''Attack of the Clones'' as Lillea Bringbit|<ref name="HB" />}}
Lillea Bringbit first appeared in the [[2002]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="Episode II" /> The character was portrayed by [[Lucasfilm]] costume archivist [[Gillian Libbert]]<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|75|Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night}}</ref> at the prompting of Visual Effects Supervisor [[John Knoll]]. As the character, Libbert wore an outfit cobbled together from various sources. While filming, Libbert had a tendency to overreact, causing retakes and Knoll telling her to tone her performance down. Libbert did not realize how prominent Bringbit would be in the scene and upon seeing herself in the film, she was mortified.<ref name="HB" /> 

Bringbit was first named in "[[Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night]]," an article written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and published in the seventy-fifth issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''<ref name="Insider" /> on [[April 6]], [[2004]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20040315.html|text=The New Face of Evil}}</ref> "Lillea Bringbit" is a modified letter rearrangement of "Gillian Libbert."<ref name="Insider" />
